creator: gfcalderon@gmail.com
text:
I upgraded to latest revision (2.5.26_1) of Urbackup Server on a TrueNAS Jail (FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p2) from previous revision (2.5.26) and now it doesn’t startup.

I also created a new jail with same FreeBSD release, installed latest revision of UrBackup Server and get the same problem.

Here is the log:
2022-09-21 13:30:53: Starting HTTP-Server on port 55414
2022-09-21 13:30:53: HTTP: Server started up successfully!
2022-09-21 13:30:53: Generating Server private/public ECDSA key...
Segmentation fault
